results.title: Cave in Türkiye challenges what we thought about Neanderthal culture
results.description: An ancient cave reveals that Neanderthals and modern humans made similar tools, hunted alike, and collected the same symbolic seashells.

results.title: Pune Municipal Corporation To Continue Regular Water Supply; No Immediate Water Cuts, Says Mayor Manjusha Nagpure
results.description: According to the Water Supply Department, the water stock in the Khadakwasla dam chain has increased to 16.64 TMC following continuous rainfall. Just a few weeks ago, the storage had dropped to 3.81 TMC, prompting the civic body to introduce alternate-day water supply from June 15 to conserve water.

results.title: What did India gain from PM Modi's Seychelles, Indonesia and Australia visits? BJP explains
results.description: The Bharatiya Janata Party on Sunday opined on the benefits India gained from Prime Minister Narendra Modi's foreign visits this July. BJP MP and national spokesperson Sambit Patra explained how the Prime Minister's visits strengthened India's strategic, economic and diplomatic interests.
